rule.instruction: All architectural points connected by straight lines.

designs.title: corner web
designs.intent: 4 corners joined — square + the two diagonals; the scale-cross (Klee #8).

designs.title: corners + center
designs.intent: a pencil of lines converging at the centre (Klee #6 convergence).

designs.title: corners + midpoints
designs.intent: eight architectural points — a denser woven star (Klee #51).

designs.title: the full architectural web
designs.intent: corners + midpoints + centre, all joined — the canonical #51 (Klee #6).

designs.title: octagon string-art
designs.intent: 8 perimeter points fully joined — regular-polygon string art (Klee #6).

designs.title: 16-gon string-art
designs.intent: 16 perimeter points — dense moiré-like envelope (Klee #6, fine/dense).

designs.title: 3×3 grid mesh
designs.intent: nine grid points fully joined — structural lattice (Klee #11).

designs.title: 4×4 grid mesh
designs.intent: sixteen grid points — dense rectilinear+diagonal mesh (Klee #11, dense).

designs.title: irregular web (8)
designs.intent: 8 random architectural points — an individual, organic web (Klee #11).

designs.title: irregular web (14)
designs.intent: 14 random points — dense irregular thicket (Klee #11, dense).

designs.title: full web, hand-drawn
designs.intent: the canonical web with a gentle living line (Klee #3).

designs.title: irregular web, hand-drawn
designs.intent: irregular net with a wandering line — most organic (Klee #3, #11).

designs.title: 16-gon, soft
designs.intent: dense polygon web with a faint hand — shimmering envelope (Klee #3, #6).
